title: Trajectory
description: A logged agent run as a typed (state, action, observation) sequence. Tool calls are first-class actions.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent under audit.

declared_purpose.description: Natural-language statement of what the agent is intended to do.

seed.description: Random seed used for the run, enabling deterministic replay.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata (timestamp, model version, etc.).

state.description: Agent context at time t: memory, conversation history, available tools.

parameters.description: Tool call parameters as key-value pairs.

observation.description: Tool response received after the action.
